interfaces.name: ButtonProps

properties.name: className
properties.description: Optional class name for the button component.
properties.rawdescription: Optional class name for the button component.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Disables the button if set to true.
properties.rawdescription: Disables the button if set to true.

properties.name: external
properties.description: If set to true and if href is provided, the link will be opened in a new tab.
properties.rawdescription: If set to true and if href is provided, the link will be opened in a new tab.

properties.name: href
properties.description: If present, the button will be rendered as a link with this href.
properties.rawdescription: If present, the button will be rendered as a link with this href.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: An optional icon to display in the button.
properties.rawdescription: An optional icon to display in the button.

properties.name: iconClassName
properties.description: Optional class name for the icon in the button.
properties.rawdescription: Optional class name for the icon in the button.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label is the text that is displayed on the button.
properties.rawdescription: The label is the text that is displayed on the button.

properties.name: labelClassName
properties.description: Optional class name for the label in the button.
properties.rawdescription: Optional class name for the label in the button.

properties.name: onClick
properties.description: The onClick function is called when the button is clicked.
properties.rawdescription: The onClick function is called when the button is clicked.

properties.name: stateClassName
properties.description: Optional class name for the state layer in the button.
properties.rawdescription: Optional class name for the state layer in the button.

properties.name: title
properties.description: The title is used as the tooltip text when the button is hovered.
properties.rawdescription: The title is used as the tooltip text when the button is hovered.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The 'type' of the button, defaults to 'button'. One of 'button', 'submit', 'reset', or undefined.
properties.rawdescription: The 'type' of the button, defaults to 'button'. One of 'button', 'submit', 'reset', or undefined.

properties.name: variant
properties.description: The button variant determines the style of the button.
properties.rawdescription: The button variant determines the style of the button.

components.name: ButtonComponent

inputsClass.name: label
inputsClass.rawdescription: The label is the text that is displayed on the button.
inputsClass.description: The label is the text that is displayed on the button.
